creator: fancypantsorama@gmail.com
text:
Have a Fujitsu T732 i5-3300 or something 16 GB Ram 280GB HD.
The installer sees the hard drive correctly but won't select it as default. Its a shame this machine runs slow under windows 11 but would be nice on FreeBSD 14 same error since FREEBSD 10. All of the OSes by the way have a problem with this system except bodhi and windows 2007 and up.

Regards-

Chris Russo
